title: Be Here Now
author: Ram Dass
subline: Remember, always, to be here now.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A single large eye: a thin oval outline. Inside: a red iris (the only red), and a tiny black pupil at the center. The eye stares directly at the viewer. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1100)" fill="none">
    <!-- Outer eye outline -->
    <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="500" ry="280" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- Inner eye outline (suggests depth) -->
    <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="480" ry="260" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <!-- Iris: red filled circle -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="160" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- Pupil: a black void at the center -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="56" fill="#000000"/>
    <!-- Tiny white highlight reflection -->
    <circle cx="-22" cy="-22" r="10" fill="#ffffff"/>
    <!-- Upper eyelash hint: short hairlines on top -->
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2">
      <line x1="-450" y1="-200" x2="-470" y2="-260"/>
      <line x1="-300" y1="-260" x2="-310" y2="-330"/>
      <line x1="-150" y1="-280" x2="-150" y2="-360"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="-280" x2="0" y2="-360"/>
      <line x1="150" y1="-280" x2="150" y2="-360"/>
      <line x1="300" y1="-260" x2="310" y2="-330"/>
      <line x1="450" y1="-200" x2="470" y2="-260"/>
    </g>
  </g>
  <!-- The word 'NOW' floating subtly above the eye -->
  <text x="800" y="380" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.6em">NOW</text>
</svg>
rationale: A single eye stares directly at the viewer. The eye outline is hairline ash; the iris is RED — the only chromatic element; the pupil is the only true black, a void at the center. The word 'NOW' floats in whisper caps above. The title 'Be / Here Now' sits over the eye at 360px mixed-case, weight 300, calm. The eye-as-presence metaphor: you can only be present in the moment you are looking at.
